extDesc.message: Instantly copy Markdown links with a single click

bracketDesc.message: If OFF, brackets will be removed from the link text.

pipeDesc.message: If OFF, outputs as half-width (may break Markdown tables).

urlDecodeDesc.message: If ON, encoded URLs (e.g. Japanese chars) are decoded.

fragDecodeDesc.message: If ON, encoded text fragments in URLs will be decoded.

truncFormatDesc.message: If ON, ultra-long text will be shortened using the 'Start...,End...' format.

truncThresholdDesc.message: Text longer than this limit will be truncated.

truncBaseLenDesc.message: Number of characters to extract from start and end.

previewSelVal.message: This is a sample text for the live preview. If you select a very long text, you can see how it is truncated into 'Start...,End...' format based on your settings.
